facts: wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:18-38,41-96,107-356,522-803 adds the external-models dashboard state, packet-backed action dispatch, and overview/routes/action-result panels.
wild_boar_proxy/ui_shell.py:51-114,358-430,604-787 adds external-models packet schema, snapshot builders, and action-result normalization.
tests/test_web_ui.py:189-319,534-603 adds fake packet coverage and non-readiness assertions.
tests/test_ui_shell.py:189-319,512-623 adds packet fixture coverage for snapshot/action normalization.
wild_boar_proxy/ui_shell.py:730-735 loads external-models state via runner.run(...) packet calls only.
wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:225-356 dispatches existing external-models CLI commands only with no local state/log reads.
wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py:776-800 labels the UI surface as evidence-only and does not promote it to runtime/listener/profile/Codex readiness.
No scoped-file change touches wild_boar_proxy/runtime.py or changes runtime command semantics.
residual_risks: wild_boar_proxy/web_ui.py exposes control-lite route enable/disable actions; if the contour is later re-scoped to strictly read-only, that policy boundary would need a fresh decision.
